## Summary

Describe the user-visible problem and the focused solution.

## Evidence

- [ ] I added or updated a test and observed it fail for the intended reason before implementation.
- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally.
- [ ] Fixtures and examples contain only public or synthetic data.
- [ ] Documentation reflects any public behavior change.

## Safety

- [ ] This change keeps GitHub access `GET`-only and does not read or print tokens.
- [ ] This change does not contain private repository data, credentials, email addresses, or application correspondence.
- [ ] Required evidence still fails closed and optional uncertainty is explicit.

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the full workflow and [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for private vulnerability reports.
